flags.description: Scope 2 market-based total: PDF p.34 reports 47.0 ktCO2e, Excel Sheet3 sums to 44.8 ktCO2e (~4.7% delta)
Total Scope 1+2 market-based: PDF p.33 reports 359 ktCO2e, Excel Reconciliation reports 335 ktCO2e
EU Taxonomy revenue alignment cited as both 52.0% (Siemens w/o SHS, p.19) and 29.3% (full Siemens, p.19) — different scopes, requires human review
